## What & why

## How it was tested

<!-- TDD evidence: what tests were added/changed, and how you verified behavior. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (output is pristine — no stray warnings)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests (TDD)
- [ ] No new domain coupling; OSS-only deps (no TipTap Pro/Cloud)
- [ ] Peer-dependency contract intact (guard tests pass)
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented
- [ ] Commits include the required AI-attribution trailer if AI-assisted
